mapper.select: SELECT job_id, job_category, job_nm, remark, ord_seq FROM esg.tb_job_competency_assessment_jobmgmt WHERE comp_id = #{compId} AND use_yn = 'Y' UNION ALL SELECT a.orgn_role_id as job_id, CASE WHEN a.orgn_role_type = 'safety' THEN '안전보건' WHEN a.orgn_role_type = 'risk' THEN '위험성평가' END AS job_category, CASE WHEN a.orgn_role_type = 'safety' THEN c.orgn_role_nm WHEN a.orgn_role_type = 'risk' THEN d.orgn_role_nm END AS job_nm, a.content as remark, 0 as ord_seq FROM esg.tb_safety_duties_doc a LEFT JOIN esg.tb_safety_duties_doc_user b ON a.write_year = b.write_year AND a.doc_type = b.doc_type AND a.doc_no = b.doc_no LEFT JOIN esg.tb_safety_health_org_chart_orgn_role c ON a.orgn_role_type = 'safety' AND a.orgn_role_id = c.orgn_role_id LEFT JOIN esg.tb_risk_assessment_organ_chart_orgn_role d ON a.orgn_role_type = 'risk' AND a.orgn_role_id = d.orgn_role_id WHERE b.hr_id = #{hrId} AND a.comp_id = #{compId} AND (c.comp_id is null or (c.comp_id is not null and c.comp_id = #{compId})) AND (d.comp_id is null or (d.comp_id is not null and d.comp_id = #{compId})) AND b.doc_no = (SELECT MAX(b.doc_no) FROM esg.tb_safety_duties_doc a LEFT JOIN esg.tb_safety_duties_doc_user b ON a.write_year = b.write_year AND a.doc_type = b.doc_type AND a.doc_no = b.doc_no WHERE a.comp_id = #{compId} AND b.hr_id = #{hrId} AND a.use_yn = 'Y' ) ORDER BY ord_seq
SELECT * FROM esg.tb_job_competency_assessment_jobmgmt WHERE comp_id = #{compId} ORDER BY ord_seq

select ROW_NUMBER() over (order by orgn_role_type desc, ord_seq) as ord_seq, comp_id, job_category, job_nm, orgn_role_type, orgn_role_id, use_yn, remark, created_at, created_by, updated_at, updated_by FROM ( SELECT comp_id, orgn_role_id, orgn_role_nm as job_nm, '안전보건' as job_category, 'safety' as orgn_role_type, ord_seq, use_yn, remark, created_at, created_by, updated_at, updated_by FROM esg.tb_safety_health_org_chart_orgn_role WHERE comp_id = #{compId} AND use_yn = 'Y' UNION ALL SELECT comp_id, orgn_role_id, orgn_role_nm as job_nm, '위험성평가' as job_category, 'risk' as orgn_role_type, ord_seq, use_yn, remark, created_at, created_by, updated_at, updated_by FROM esg.tb_risk_assessment_organ_chart_orgn_role WHERE comp_id = #{compId} AND use_yn = 'Y' ) AS test ORDER BY orgn_role_type desc, ord_seq

SELECT ROW_NUMBER() over (order by orgn_role_type desc, ord_seq) as ord_seq, job_category, job_nm, orgn_role_type, orgn_role_id, use_yn, remark FROM ( SELECT orgn_role_id, orgn_role_nm as job_nm, '안전보건' as job_category, 'safety' as orgn_role_type, ord_seq, use_yn, remark FROM dataset.tb_dataset_safety_health_org_chart_orgn_role WHERE use_yn = 'Y' UNION ALL SELECT orgn_role_id, orgn_role_nm as job_nm, '위험성평가' as job_category, 'risk' as orgn_role_type, ord_seq, use_yn, remark FROM dataset.tb_dataset_risk_assessment_organ_chart_orgn_role WHERE use_yn = 'Y' ) AS test ORDER BY orgn_role_type desc, ord_seq
mapper.insert:
SELECT CASE WHEN #{jobId} IS NULL or #{jobId} = '' THEN TO_CHAR(now(), 'yyyymmdd') || lpad((COALESCE(MAX(SUBSTRING(job_id from 9 for 4))::int, 0) + 1)::text , 4, '0') END as job_id FROM esg.tb_job_competency_assessment_jobmgmt WHERE job_id like to_char(now(), 'yyyymmdd') || '%' AND comp_id = #{compId} LIMIT 1
INSERT INTO esg.tb_job_competency_assessment_jobmgmt ( comp_id, job_id, job_category, job_nm, remark, ord_seq, use_yn, created_at, created_by ) VALUES ( #{compId}, #{jobId}, #{jobCategory}, #{jobNm}, #{remark}, #{ordSeq}, #{useYn}, NOW(), #{createdBy} )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM esg.tb_job_competency_assessment_joblevel WHERE comp_id = #{compId} ORDER BY ord_seq
mapper.insert:
SELECT CASE WHEN #{jobLevelId} IS NULL or #{jobLevelId} = '' THEN TO_CHAR(now(), 'yyyymmdd') || lpad((COALESCE(MAX(SUBSTRING(job_level_id from 9 for 4))::int, 0) + 1)::text , 4, '0') ELSE #{jobLevelId} END as job_level_id FROM esg.tb_job_competency_assessment_joblevel WHERE job_level_id like to_char(now(), 'yyyymmdd') || '%' AND comp_id = #{compId} LIMIT 1
INSERT INTO esg.tb_job_competency_assessment_joblevel( comp_id, job_level_id, job_level_nm, remark, ord_seq, use_yn, created_at, created_by ) VALUES ( #{compId}, #{jobLevelId}, #{jobLevelNm}, #{remark}, #{ordSeq}, #{useYn}, NOW(), #{createdBy} )
mapper.select: SELECT tjca.* , sf.file_id as logoId , case when taia.signature is not null then 'Y' when taiR.signature is not null then 'I' when taiw.signature is not null then 'W' else 'C' end as approvalStatus FROM esg.tb_job_competency_assessment tjca LEFT JOIN esg.tb_orgn_info toi ON toi.orgn_id = tjca.orgn_id AND toi.comp_id = tjca.comp_id LEFT JOIN esg.tb_approval_info taiw ON taiw.target_type = 'JCA' AND taiw.target_id = tjca.write_year || tjca.doc_no AND taiw.param = 'writer' LEFT JOIN esg.tb_approval_info tair ON tair.target_type = 'JCA' AND tair.target_id = tjca.write_year || tjca.doc_no AND tair.param = 'reviewer' LEFT JOIN esg.tb_approval_info taia ON taia.target_type = 'JCA' AND taia.target_id = tjca.write_year || tjca.doc_no AND taia.param = 'approver' LEFT JOIN esg.tb_sys_file sf ON sf.target_id = tjca.hr_id AND sf.target_type = 'hrImg' WHERE tjca.comp_id = #{compId} AND tjca.doc_type = 'JCA' AND ( ( tjca.write_year = (#{writeYear}::integer -1)::varchar AND tjca.use_yn = 'Y' ) OR tjca.write_year = #{writeYear} ) ORDER BY toi.ord_seq ASC, tjca.use_yn DESC, tjca.write_year DESC
mapper.insert:
SELECT LPAD((COALESCE(MAX(doc_no::INTEGER), 0) + 1)::TEXT, 5, '0') AS docNo FROM esg.tb_job_competency_assessment WHERE write_year = #{writeYear} AND doc_type = #{docType}
INSERT INTO esg.tb_job_competency_assessment ( write_year, doc_type, doc_no, comp_id, hr_id, hr_nm, orgn_id, orgn_nm, jbrp_id, jbrp_nm, use_yn, created_at, created_by ) VALUES ( #{writeYear}, #{docType}, #{docNo}, #{compId}, #{hrId}, #{hrNm}, #{orgnId}, #{orgnNm}, #{jbrpId}, #{jbrpNm}, #{useYn}, now(), #{createdBy} )

SELECT LPAD((COALESCE(MAX(doc_seq::INTEGER), 0) + 1)::TEXT, 5, '0') AS docSeq FROM esg.tb_job_competency_assessment_detail WHERE write_year = #{writeYear} AND doc_type = #{docType} AND doc_no = #{docNo}
INSERT INTO esg.tb_job_competency_assessment_detail ( write_year, doc_type, doc_no, doc_seq, comp_id, job_category, job_id, job_nm, demand_level_id, demand_level_nm, current_level_id, current_level_nm, training_course, training_course_nm, training_institute, training_institute_nm, training_content, use_yn, created_at, created_by ) VALUES ( #{writeYear}, #{docType}, #{docNo}, #{docSeq}, #{compId}, #{jobCategory}, #{jobId}, #{jobNm}, #{demandLevelId}, #{demandLevelNm}, #{currentLevelId}, #{currentLevelNm}, #{trainingCourse}, #{trainingCourseNm}, #{trainingInstitute}, #{trainingInstituteNm}, #{trainingContent}, #{useYn}, now(), #{createdBy} )
mapper.update: UPDATE esg.tb_job_competency_assessment_detail SET job_category = #{jobCategory}, job_id = #{jobId}, job_nm = #{jobNm}, demand_level_id = #{demandLevelId}, demand_level_nm = #{demandLevelNm}, current_level_id = #{currentLevelId}, current_level_nm = #{currentLevelNm}, training_course = #{trainingCourse}, training_course_nm = #{trainingCourseNm}, training_institute = #{trainingInstitute}, training_institute_nm = #{trainingInstituteNm}, training_content = #{trainingContent}, use_yn = #{useYn}, updated_at = now(), updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE write_year = #{writeYear} AND doc_type = #{docType} AND doc_no = #{docNo} AND doc_seq = #{docSeq} AND comp_id = #{compId}
mapper.select: select t1.doc_no from esg.tb_job_competency_assessment t1 left join esg.tb_orgn_info t2 on t1.orgn_id = t2.orgn_id and t1.comp_id = t2.comp_id where t1.write_year = #{writeYear} and t1.use_yn = 'Y' order by t2.ord_seq asc
